t: What shape is a ball?
e: A ball is shaped like a sphere -- it is perfectly round in every direction.

t: What 3D shape does a soup can look like?
e: A soup can is shaped like a cylinder -- it has 2 flat circular faces and 1 curved surface.

t: How many faces does a cube have?
e: A cube has 6 faces. Think of a dice -- top, bottom, front, back, left, right.

t: What 3D shape looks like an ice cream cone?
e: An ice cream cone is shaped like a cone -- it has a point at one end and a circle at the other.

t: What 3D shape does a cereal box look like?
e: A cereal box is a rectangular prism -- it has 6 flat rectangular faces.

t: How many flat faces does a sphere have?
e: A sphere has 0 flat faces. It is completely curved all around, like a ball.

t: Which 3D shape can roll AND slide?
e: A cylinder can roll (on its curved side) and slide (on its flat faces).

t: How many vertices (corners) does a cube have?
e: A cube has 8 vertices (corners). Think of 4 corners on top and 4 corners on bottom.

t: What shape are all 6 faces of a cube?
e: All 6 faces of a cube are squares. Each face is the same size.

t: Which solid shape has NO edges and NO vertices?
e: A sphere has no edges and no vertices. It is completely smooth and round.

t: How many edges does a cube have?
e: A cube has 12 edges -- the lines where two faces meet.

t: What 3D shape does a basketball look like?
e: A basketball is shaped like a sphere -- round in every direction.

t: A cone has how many flat faces?
e: A cone has 1 flat face (the circular base) and 1 curved surface that goes up to a point.

t: Which 3D shape can only roll (not slide on a flat face)?
e: A sphere can only roll because it has no flat faces to slide on.

t: What 3D shape does a party hat look like?
e: A party hat is shaped like a cone -- wide at the bottom and pointed at the top.

t: A rectangular prism has how many faces?
e: A rectangular prism has 6 faces, just like a cube. But its faces can be rectangles of different sizes.

t: Which shape has a point (apex) at the top?
e: A cone has a point (called the apex) at the top and a flat circular base.

t: What 3D shape does a tissue box look like?
e: A tissue box is shaped like a rectangular prism -- it has 6 rectangular faces.

t: How many flat faces does a cylinder have?
e: A cylinder has 2 flat circular faces -- one on the top and one on the bottom.

t: True or false: A cube can stack on top of another cube.
o: Only if they are the same size
e: True! Cubes have flat faces, so they stack easily. Flat faces let shapes sit on top of each other.
